recommendations.title: Enable Page Caching
recommendations.description: Page caching can dramatically improve your site speed by serving static versions of your pages to visitors.
actions: Enable page caching in the cache settings
Set up cache preloading for popular pages

recommendations.title: Enable File Minification
recommendations.description: Minification is disabled for: CSS, JavaScript, HTML. Minifying files reduces their size and improves load times.
actions: Enable minification for CSS, JavaScript, and HTML files
Test your site after enabling to ensure compatibility
Consider combining files to reduce HTTP requests

recommendations.title: Optimize Pending Images
recommendations.description: You have 15 images waiting to be optimized. Optimized images load faster and use less bandwidth.
actions: Enable automatic optimization for new uploads
Consider using modern image formats (WebP, AVIF)
